logistics_cost_model.cost_formula: per_trip_cost = road_distance_km / fuel_efficiency_km_per_liter * fuel_cost + duration_min / 60 * driver_count * labor_cost
logistics_cost_model.mvp_note: Use this as a comparable planning score until an approved routing provider and vehicle-capacity model are connected.
